data-scopes.title.name: Name
data-scopes.description.name: Display name for this data scope configuration
data-scopes.description.description: Short description of what this data scope covers
data-scopes.description.type: Controls which rows of data the assigned role can access
data-scopes.description.type.ALL: Access to all data regardless of ownership or department
data-scopes.description.type.DEPT_AND_BE: Access to the user's own department and all its sub-departments
data-scopes.description.type.DEPT: Access to data within the user's own department only
data-scopes.description.type.CUSTOM: Access to data within a manually specified set of departments
data-scopes.description.type.SELF: Access to data created by or belonging to the current user only
data-scopes.description.customDeptIds: Set of department IDs explicitly granted access; only used when scope type is CUSTOM
